title: Assign teams in column permissions
excerpt: Some of my boards are viewable by multiple teams within our company. But some of the columns within those boards should only be editable by members of my development team. But whenever I limit column edit access, I have …

posts.author: clayanderson (Clay Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Some of my boards are viewable by multiple teams within our company. But some of the columns within those boards should only be editable by members of my development team. But whenever I limit column edit access, I have to specify all the members of my team individually. I would greatly prefer to simply grant access to the team itself.

posts.author: Krishele (Krishele Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would greatly prefer to simply grant access to the team itself.

That’s a good shout. Maybe a quick update to the column would be to allow teams to be assigned.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

Just wanted to let you know this feature is released! Hope this feature helps with your workflows. If you have any questions o feel free to post in our product discussion section.

Also make sure to check out our new feature request process.

All you need to know about our new Feature Request process Feature requests
Welcome to the feature request part of our community! This is your opportunity to get involved in our development process. Share and vote on features you would like to see implemented in the platform so we can build a roadmap together that best reflects your needs. How do you submit a feature request? First, check if your idea already exists in the "feature request" category and vote on that topic. That way, our team can see which features are most requested. You can use the search function o…
